case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY RANDALL BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY RANDALL BAIL BONDS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,596.00
